# Plant cell wall strength

## Short Teaching Summary
Plant cell wall strength: Cellulose is the main component of plant cell walls, giving the plant cell strength and support. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
